name: gpt5p3_codex_text_only_calibrated_eval
constraints: gpt-5 with code_interpreter fails at least one kept item
human-solvable with the same tool and constraints

items.prompt:
Use Python in the code interpreter.

Compute the answer exactly from this DATA block.

Rules (must be followed exactly):
1) DATA is the exact text between BEGIN_DATA and END_DATA, including newline characters between lines.
2) Do not unicode-normalize anything.
3) Treat backslash sequences literally (example: \u200d is six characters).
4) Build list C of every character in DATA except newline.
5) Keep c in C iff ord(c) is prime OR ord(c) has exactly 3 distinct prime factors.
6) Convert each kept ord(c) to base-36 uppercase (digits 0-9 then A-Z).
7) Join these tokens using ':' to form string T.
8) Compute blake2s hex digest of UTF-8 bytes of T.
9) Output only digest[8:40] reversed, lowercase hex, exactly 32 chars.

Return only the 32-character answer.
